_warning: SHA256 values pinned from upstream .sha256 sidecar files at files.openscad.org on 2026-04-21. Re-verify against upstream before any production release. OpenSCAD 2021.01 is the latest published stable; newer builds are snapshots at files.openscad.org/snapshots/. No native aarch64-apple-darwin DMG is published for 2021.01 — Apple Silicon Macs run the x86_64 DMG via Rosetta 2. Bump to a dated snapshot (e.g. 2025.06.09) only after re-pinning all four hashes.

aarch64-apple-darwin._note: same x86_64 DMG — runs on Apple Silicon via Rosetta 2. Swap to a native arm64 snapshot build once upstream publishes one for the stable channel.
